chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ مَمْلُوكَ غَيْرِهِ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The free man kills a slave of someone else, or injures him, and the slave kills the free or injures him

text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي أَنْفِ الْعَبْدِ أَوْ ذَكَرِهِ أَوْ شَيْ‏ءٍ يُحِيطُ بِثَمَنِهِ أَنَّهُ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى مَوْلَاهُ قِيمَةَ الْعَبْدِ وَ يَأْخُذُ الْعَبْدَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Maryam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a nose of the slave, or his manhood, or something which overcame his value, and he has to pay to his master the value of the slave, and take the slave’.
